import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './events.css'; const events = [ { title: 'Community Food Drive', date: '12 Aug 2026', day: '12', mon: 'Aug', venue: 'Town Hall, Salem', seats: '45 seats left', raised: 38000, goal: 50000, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1484712401471-05c7215830eb?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80', }, { title: 'Back to School Kit Camp', date: '24 Aug 2026', day: '24', mon: 'Aug', venue: 'Nehru School, Salem', seats: '20 seats left', raised: 14500, goal: 25000, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1497486751825-1233686d5d80?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80', }, { title: 'Health Awareness Rally', date: '04 Sep 2026', day: '04', mon: 'Sep', venue: 'Fort Grounds, Salem', seats: '60 seats left', raised: 27000, goal: 40000, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1516549655169-df83a0774514?auto=format&fit=crop&w=900&q=80', }, ]; function formatINR(n) { return '₹' + n.toLocaleString('en-IN'); } /* Animates 0 → target% on mount */ function ProgressBar({ raised, goal }) { const pct = Math.min(Math.round((raised / goal) * 100), 100); const [width, setWidth] = useState(0); const ref = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { const id = setTimeout(() => setWidth(pct), 150); return () => clearTimeout(id); }, [pct]); return (
{formatINR(raised)} raised {pct}% of {formatINR(goal)}
); } export default function Events() { return ( <> {/* ── Hero ─────────────────────────────────── */}

))}

); }
